category_sources: source_facts.description identifies dashing as a tool to generate Dash documentation from HTML files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dashing; source_facts.repo is technosophos/dashing.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage and source_facts.repo point to the official GitHub repository; README is the best official documentation surface supplied.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it generates Dash documentation from HTML files; source_facts.executables lists dashing.
